generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring input current I_M for the permanent magnet synchronous motors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor-mounted position encoder for the MABI MAX 100 robot's drive system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionStream
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox for the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionStream
]

instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "MQTT stream of input current I_M time series data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "MQTT stream of motor position angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "MQTT stream of gearbox position angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series input current I_M data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series motor position angle data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series gearbox position angle data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML models for requirements, functional, logical, and product/technical abstraction levels using MBSE methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance ACMEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description for component and connector relationships in MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEEnabler
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL architecture description for component and connector relationships in MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical simulation models using MathWorks Simulink for MABI MAX 100 robot dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CppModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C++ implementation of detailed behavior for MABI MAX 100 robot components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppEnabler
]

instance JavaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Java implementation of detailed behavior for MABI MAX 100 robot components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for MBSE-based system structure and behavior description"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description language tooling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL architecture description language tooling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation for detailed behavior and dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, OptimizationService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java implementation for detailed behavior and dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard interface for visualizing MABI MAX 100 robot's real-time status and performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service identifying joint friction to enhance motion accuracy of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight, MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot state and performance metrics"
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction parameters affecting robot motion accuracy"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot motion parameters to compensate for identified joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motors used in MABI MAX 100 robot drives"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gears coupling motors for actuation in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840D : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl control system for axis control in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the MABI MAX 100 serial robot for digital twin modeling"
    base:contains MotorCurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, CycloidalGear, SiemensSINUMERIK840D
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmission uses MQTT protocol. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system utilizes Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies, incorporating SysML [17] for modeling, architecture description languages (ADLs) such as ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26], and SysML IBDs [17,27] for component & connector-based architecture descriptions across requirements, functional, logical, and product/technical abstraction levels. Methodologies including RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are applied for complexity management, with behavior modeling using MontiArc Automaton or SysML state machines, integrated with tools like MathWorks Simulink [28], simulation methods [29,30], and general-purpose programming languages (C++, Java) to address heterogeneous stakeholder perspectives [31]."
]
